data.title: Denali Therapeutics Gains FDA Approval for AVLAYAH Therapy
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An update from Denali Therapeutics ( (DNLI) ) is now available.

On March 25, 2026, Denali Therapeutics announced that the U.S. Food and Drug Administration granted accelerated approval to AVLAYAH (tividenofusp alfa-eknm), an enzyme replacement therapy for neurologic manifestations of Hunter syndrome in presymptomatic or symptomatic pediatric patients weighing at least 5 kg before advanced neurologic impairment. The therapy, the first new U.S. treatment for Hunter syndrome in nearly two decades and the first FDA-approved brain-penetrant biologic leveraging the transferrin receptor to cross the blood-brain barrier, is enabled by Denali’s TransportVehicle platform and earned the company a Rare Pediatric Disease Priority Review Voucher.

The approval is based on Phase 1/2 data showing a 91% reduction in cerebrospinal fluid heparan sulfate, with most treated children reaching biomarker levels comparable to individuals without the disease, while continued approval depends on confirmatory results from the ongoing global Phase 2/3 COMPASS trial. AVLAYAH, administered once weekly and expected to be available in the U.S. shortly after approval, is viewed by clinicians and patient advocates as a potential new standard of care that addresses long-standing neurologic needs in Hunter syndrome and exemplifies a biomarker-driven regulatory pathway that could speed development of therapies for other rare pediatric conditions.

The most recent analyst rating on (DNLI) stock is a Buy with a $30.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Denali Therapeutics stock, see the DNLI Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on DNLI Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, DNLI is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weak financial performance (widening losses, zero revenue in 2024–2025, and ongoing cash burn). This is partly offset by strong technical momentum (price above key moving averages with positive MACD) and constructive corporate events that improve funding and highlight meaningful upcoming regulatory/clinical milestones, while valuation remains constrained by loss-making results and no dividend.

To see Spark’s full report on DNLI stock, click here.

More about Denali Therapeutics

Denali Therapeutics Inc., based in South San Francisco and listed on Nasdaq as DNLI, is a biopharmaceutical company focused on developing biologic medicines that can cross the blood-brain barrier to treat neurodegenerative and lysosomal storage diseases. Its proprietary TransportVehicle platform is designed to deliver enzyme replacement and other biotherapeutics to the whole body, including the central nervous system, targeting rare conditions such as Hunter syndrome (MPS II).

Average Trading Volume: 1,633,416

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $3.34B

See more data about DNLI stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Selkirk Copper Extends High-Grade Zones in Minto Mine Restart Push
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Venerable Ventures ( (TSE:SCMI) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Selkirk Copper reported new drill results from its 50,000 metre Phase 1 program at the Minto mine, showing expanded high-grade mineralization at the Minto North and Minto East zones and confirming multiple stacked lenses that remain open for further growth. Shallow mineralization at the Ridgetop and Area 118 zones continues to extend beyond current open-pit outlines, supporting potential expansion of near-surface resources as the company refines underground and open-pit development plans and advances a Preliminary Economic Assessment targeted for mid-2026.

Four drill rigs have now completed 97% of the Phase 1 program, with results from roughly half of the drilling released to date and additional assays to come in the first half of 2026. The updated drilling and on-site operational work are sharpening Selkirk Copper’s restart plans for Minto, with implications for increased mine life, optionality between underground and open-pit mining, and enhanced project economics for stakeholders if the resource growth is confirmed.

More about Venerable Ventures

Selkirk Copper Mines Inc. is a Canadian mining company focused on the Minto copper-gold-silver mine in Yukon, where it is advancing a restart strategy. The company is targeting both underground and open-pit resource expansion, positioning itself as a copper-focused producer with meaningful gold and silver by-products in the North American base metals sector.

Average Trading Volume: 715,521

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$101.1M

data.title: Smart Capital Completes Marcap Acquisition to Bolster Central Italy Platform
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An update from Smart Capital S.P.A. ( (IT:SMCAP) ) is now available.

Smart Capital S.p.A. has completed the acquisition of 100% of Marcap S.p.A., an industrial holding based in Recanati, for €4.67 million, while its technology vertical Smart4Tech S.p.A. has acquired Marcap’s advisory business unit, spun off into MARCAP Advisory, for €0.43 million. The deal strengthens Smart Capital’s presence and deal origination capacity in central Italy, broadens its entrepreneurial shareholder network through the reinvestment of Marcap’s current shareholders in Smart Capital’s capital for about €4 million by March 2026, and enhances its corporate finance advisory platform by leveraging Marcap’s expertise and relationships to support future growth and value creation.

The most recent analyst rating on (IT:SMCAP) stock is a Buy with a EUR2.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Smart Capital S.P.A. stock, see the IT:SMCAP Stock Forecast page.

More about Smart Capital S.P.A.

Smart Capital S.p.A. is a permanent capital industrial holding company focused on private equity and private investments in public equity, targeting Italian small and medium-sized enterprises at various stages, including listed, unlisted and pre-IPO. The group pursues long-term, entrepreneurial investments in niche market leaders with strong management teams and value creation plans aligned with ESG best practices in Italy and abroad.

Average Trading Volume: 4,839

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Transportadora De Gas Sa Ord B ( (TGS) ) has provided an announcement.

On March 25, 2026, Transportadora de Gas del Sur S.A. filed a Form 6-K in the United States to furnish its annual report and consolidated financial statements for the year ended December 31, 2025. The filing includes audited consolidated statements of income, financial condition, changes in shareholders’ equity, and cash flows, along with a glossary of regulatory and industry terms that frame the company’s operations within Argentina’s natural gas sector.

By making these 2025 results and disclosures available to U.S. and Argentine regulators and investors, the company reinforces its reporting transparency and compliance as a foreign issuer. The detailed documentation of its financial position and industry context provides stakeholders with an updated view of its performance and regulatory environment, potentially informing valuation, risk assessment, and strategic expectations for its role in the Argentine gas market.

CAVA Group, Inc. ( (CAVA) ) has shared an update.

On March 20, 2026, CAVA Group, Inc. entered into Amendment No. 3 to its existing Credit Agreement with various financial institutions and JPMorgan Chase Bank, N.A. acting as administrative agent. The amendment, formalized and signed on March 25, 2026 by Chief Financial Officer Tricia Tolivar, reflects an updated material definitive financing arrangement that may influence the company’s capital structure and access to liquidity.

The execution of this amended credit facility underscores CAVA Group’s continued reliance on bank financing to support its operations and potential expansion plans. Stakeholders, including lenders and shareholders, can view the revised agreement as a refinement of the company’s borrowing terms and banking relationships, which could affect future financial flexibility and funding costs.

Lloyds Banking ( (GB:LLOY) ) has provided an update.

Lloyds Banking Group has repurchased 15,272,678 of its ordinary shares on 25 March 2026 as part of its ongoing share buyback programme, with prices ranging between 94.56p and 96.04p and a volume-weighted average of 95.30p per share. The bank plans to cancel the repurchased shares, a move that will reduce the number of shares in circulation and can enhance earnings per share, signalling continued capital strength and a shareholder-friendly capital return strategy.

The latest tranche of buybacks was executed by Goldman Sachs International under instructions issued in January 2026, reflecting Lloyds’ continued execution of its previously announced capital management plans. This ongoing reduction of share capital underscores the group’s confidence in its balance sheet and long-term profitability while potentially supporting its share price and delivering value to investors.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:LLOY) stock is a Buy with a £103.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Lloyds Banking stock, see the GB:LLOY Stock Forecast page.

data.title: Sranan Gold Extends Randy’s Pit Mineralization Along Poeketi Shear Zone
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest update is out from Peak Minerals Ltd. ( (TSE:SRAN) ).

Sranan Gold Corp. has extended gold mineralization at the Randy’s Pit Zone by 200 metres to the northwest along the Poeketi Shear Zone, with new drilling tracing mineralization over an 800-metre strike that remains open in all directions. Recent holes include a standout intercept of 20 metres grading 1.33 g/t gold, reinforcing the continuity and potential scale of the system.

The 2026 step-out drilling confirms that the regional shear zone can host gold along much of its five-kilometre length between Randy’s Pit and the Poeketi Zone, underpinning a broader exploration thesis for multiple sub-parallel zones. These results strengthen Sranan’s geological model and could enhance the project’s strategic value by supporting the case for a larger, continuous gold-bearing structure that warrants further drilling and investment.

Spark’s Take on SRAN Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, SRAN is a Neutral.

TSE:SRAN’s overall stock score reflects significant financial challenges with no revenue and consistent losses. While technical analysis shows some positive signals, and recent corporate events suggest strategic initiatives, these factors are insufficient to overcome the financial difficulties and lack of valuation metrics.

To see Spark’s full report on SRAN stock, click here.

More about Peak Minerals Ltd.

Sranan Gold Corp. is a gold exploration company focused on developing projects along the Poeketi Shear Zone in Suriname. The company targets structurally controlled gold mineralization, advancing its Randy’s Pit and Poeketi zones where artisanal mining activity indicates significant exploration potential.

Average Trading Volume: 224,018

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: C$12.52M

data.title: Emma Villas Finalizes Merger of Subsidiary Marche Holiday Villas
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An announcement from Emma Villas S.P.A. ( (IT:EAV) ) is now available.

Emma Villas has executed the deed of merger to incorporate its wholly owned subsidiary Marche Holiday Villas S.r.l., completing a key step in a broader reorganization of the group. The merger, which was previously approved by the boards and shareholders, is designed to simplify governance and strengthen operational, administrative, and management synergies within the group.

Under Italian civil law, the merger will take effect once all required registrations are completed, while its accounting and tax effects are retroactively applied from 1 January 2026. By consolidating its structure, Emma Villas aims to streamline operations and improve efficiency, a move that may enhance its competitive positioning in the Italian vacation rental sector and provide clearer oversight for investors and other stakeholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (IT:EAV) stock is a Buy with a EUR2.90 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Emma Villas S.P.A. stock, see the IT:EAV Stock Forecast page.

More about Emma Villas S.P.A.

Emma Villas S.p.A. is a leading Italian operator in the vacation rental market, specializing in short-term rentals of villas and prestigious residences and listed on Euronext Growth Milan. The company manages a portfolio of more than 600 high-end properties across Italy and hosts over 55,000 guests annually, offering owners guaranteed income, property management services, and insurance coverage for accidental damage.

An announcement from GCP Infra Invt Shs GBP ( (GB:GCP) ) is now available.

GCP Infrastructure Investments Limited has continued to execute its share buyback programme, repurchasing 535,856 ordinary shares on 25 March 2026 at a volume-weighted average price of 73.91 pence. The shares, bought through RBC Europe Limited across multiple trading venues, are being held in treasury as part of the company’s ongoing capital management strategy.

Following the latest transaction, GCP Infra has 884,797,669 ordinary shares in issue, of which 57,076,840 are held in treasury, leaving 827,720,829 voting shares outstanding. Since the buyback programme began in December 2024, the company has acquired a total of 40,091,821 shares for treasury, a move that may enhance net asset value per share and reflects management’s efforts to optimise the capital structure for existing shareholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:GCP) stock is a Buy with a £90.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on GCP Infra Invt Shs GBP stock, see the GB:GCP Stock Forecast page.
